title: AS 4100:2020 Bolt Group Capacity
description: Design bolt groups in accordance with AS 4100:2020.

shape.description: Bolt Pattern. Symbol: \text{Pattern}. Bolt Pattern Shape.

diameter.description: Diameter. Symbol: \text{Diameter}. Units: mm. The diameter of the bolt pattern.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the bolt pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bolt at the top of the center of the circle.

circular_bolts.description: No. Bolts. Symbol: n_b. The number of bolts in the circular pattern.

x_s.description: xs. Symbol: x_{s}. Units: mm. Spacing of bolts in the X direction.

y_s.description: ys. Symbol: y_{s}. Units: mm. Spacing of bolts in the Y direction.

x_bolts.description: No. Bolts in X. Symbol: n_{bx}. The number of bolts in the X direction

y_bolts.description: No. Bolts in Y. Symbol: n_{by}. The number of bolts in the Y direction

bolts_table.description: Bolt Coordinates. Coordinates of all bolts to be considered.

grade.description: Bolt Grade. Symbol: \text{Grade}. Bolt Grade is related to the minimum tensile strength (fuf) of the bolt (see AS 4100:2020 Table 9.2.1).

f_uf.description: fuf. Symbol: f_{uf}. Units: MPa. Minimum tensile strength of bolt (see AS 4100:2020 Table 9.2.1). Related to grade of bolt.

shear_plane.description: Shear Plane. Symbol: \text{Shear Plane}. Specify if the plane in which the bolts are sheared passes through the shank or the threaded portion of the bolt. The threaded portion has a smaller cross-sectional area and may be selected for a conservative design.

prying.description: Prying Factor. Symbol: p. Factor to account for prying effect by increasing tensile loads. A value of 1.1 is recommended for rigid plates and a value of 1.2 to 1.4 is recommended for flexible plates in the Australian Guidebook for Structural Engineers.

lap_length.description: Lap Length. Symbol: l_j. Units: mm. Length of bolted lap splice connection (if applicable). Lapped connections have reduced shear capacity captured in Kr factor (AS 4100:2020 9.2.2.1).

analysis.description: Analysis Method. Symbol: \text{Analysis}. Analysis method for calculating tensile/compressive forces on bolts resulting from out-of-plane moments.

f_up.description: fup. Symbol: f_{up}. Units: MPa. Tensile strength of the steel plate. See Table 2.1 of AS 4100.

t_p.description: tp. Symbol: t_{p}. Units: mm. Thickness of steel plate.

a_e.description: Edge Distance. Symbol: a_e. Units: mm. Minimum edge distance (ae). Is defined as minimum distance from edge of a bolt to edge of a plate plus half the bolt diameter.

cut.description: Edge Preparation. Symbol: \text{Edge Preparation}. Required for minimum edge distance requirements, 9.5.2 AS 4100:2020.
x-enumLabels: Sheared or hand flame cut edge
Machine cut, sawn or planed edge

Fx.description: F*x. Symbol: F^*_x. Units: kN. Applied design action along X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fy.description: F*y. Symbol: F^*_y. Units: kN. Applied design action along Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fz.description: F*z. Symbol: F^*_z. Units: kN. Applied design action along Z-axis. A positive value is considered to apply tension to the bolts. A negative value is considered to apply compression.

Mx.description: M*x. Symbol: M^*_x. Units: kN-m. Design moment about X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

My.description: M*y. Symbol: M^*_y. Units: kN-m. Design moment about Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Mz.description: M*z. Symbol: M^*_z. Units: kN-m. Design moment about Z-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

graph_on.description: Show Stress Graphs. Toggle on/off to show stress graphs in reporting. Disabling stress graphs will result in quicker solve times.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
